prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年物理类最低位次约 14878→13886→13989→13449→16296，2025 年较 2024 年大幅后移约 2847 名，波动明显；2025 年基准约 16296 名；该校在湖南省物理类招生计划 2021–2025 年分别为 56→58→59→59→64 人，逐年小幅扩招；2026 年计划 67 人，较 2025 年增加 3 人（+4.7%），扩招幅度有限，对竞争缓解作用较弱。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211 工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜排名近年波动：2021 年第 91→2022 年第 97→2023 年第 96→2024 年第 102→2025 年第 86→2026 年第 88 名，整体处于全国百强中游，层次稳定；2025 年高考周期内声誉评价为偏负面，主要涉及师德师风事件（教师被指性骚扰学生），可能对部分考生报考心理产生轻微抑制；抖音热度排名第 90，评价为「一般」，短视频平台曝光量中等偏低，未出现明显升温信号；药学为 A+ 学科（全国顶尖），中药学类、药学类、临床药学等招生专业直接对应王牌学科，学科竞争力突出，对高分考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 药学/医药类专业社会热度持续偏热，临床医学、口腔医学等医学大类近年均为高热推荐；本省物理类考生数从 2025 年 320192 人增至 2026 年 347000 人（+8.4%），竞争基数扩大；中国药科大学位于江苏南京，非本省高校，在湖南无显著地域招生倾斜；该校在湖南招生占比约 2.5%–3%，属正常跨省招生规模。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年位次大幅后移的走势、2026 年小幅扩招（+4.7%）对竞争缓解有限、本省物理类考生增加 8.4% 加剧竞争、以及声誉偏负面可能轻微抑制报考热度，预计 2026 年物理类最低录取位次在 2025 年基准上继续小幅后移；预测最低位次约 16784 名，区间 16284–17284 名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 药学（拔尖创新班）
- 药学（杰出药学家实验班）
- 临床药学
- 生物制药（拔尖创新班）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 药学类（药学、药物制剂、药物分析、药物化学）
- 生物制药
- 中药学类（中药学、中药资源开发、中药制药）

major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间 16284–17284 名内，建议以二档药学类、生物制药为主力稳报，一档拔尖创新班和临床药学可冲刺，三档海洋药学、生物统计学等保底。位次明显优于区间下限（<16284）可重点冲击一档王牌专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 14878→13886→13989→13449→16296, with a significant drop of about 2847 places in 2025 compared to 2024, showing clear fluctuations; the baseline for 2025 is about 16296; the university's enrollment plan in Hunan for Physics Category from 2021 to 2025 was 56→58→59→59→64, with a gradual small expansion each year; the 2026 plan is 67, an increase of 3 (+4.7%) from 2025, with limited expansion impact on easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; its Soft Science main ranking has fluctuated in recent years: 91st in 2021→97th in 2022→96th in 2023→102nd in 2024→86th in 2025→88th in 2026, overall in the middle of the national top 100, with stable level; during the 2025 college entrance examination cycle, the reputation evaluation was somewhat negative, mainly involving a teacher-student ethics incident (teacher accused of sexual harassment), which may slightly suppress some candidates' application psychology; Douyin popularity ranking is 90th, rated as 'average', with moderately low exposure on short video platforms, showing no clear warming signal; Pharmacy is an A+ discipline (top in the country), and majors such as Traditional Chinese Medicine, Pharmacy, and Clinical Pharmacy directly correspond to the flagship disciplines, with outstanding disciplinary competitiveness, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Pharmacy/medical majors continue to be socially popular, with clinical medicine, stomatology, and other medical categories being highly recommended in recent years; the number of Physics Category candidates in the province increased from 320,192 in 2025 to 347,000 in 2026 (+8.4%), expanding the competition base; China Pharmaceutical University is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu, not a local university in Hunan, with no significant regional enrollment preference; the university's enrollment proportion in Hunan is about 2.5%–3%, which is a normal cross-provincial enrollment scale.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant drop in ranking in 2025, the limited relief from the small expansion in 2026 (+4.7%), the intensified competition due to an 8.4% increase in Physics Category candidates in the province, and the slightly negative reputation that may mildly suppress application enthusiasm, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will continue to drop slightly from the 2025 baseline; the predicted minimum ranking is about 16784, with a range of 16284–17284.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)

- Clinical Pharmacy
- Biopharmaceuticals (Top Innovation Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Pharmacy (Pharmacy, Pharmaceutical Preparation, Pharmaceutical Analysis, Pharmaceutical Chemistry)
- Biopharmaceuticals

- Biomedical Data Science.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Marine Pharmacy
- Biotechnology
- Biostatistics
- Food Quality and Safety
- Cosmetic Science and Technology
- Pharmaceutical Economics and Management.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 16284–17284, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors like Pharmacy and Biopharmaceuticals as stable choices, with Tier 1 top innovation classes and Clinical Pharmacy as reach options, and Tier 3 majors like Marine Pharmacy and Biostatistics as safety choices. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower bound (<16284), you can focus on aiming for Tier 1 flagship majors.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年历史类最低位次约 2924→3642→3289→3914→4028，整体呈后移趋势，近 3 年累计后移约 1104 名；2025 年基准约 4028 名；该校在湖南省历史类招生计划 2021–2024 年均为 6 人，2025 年增至 8 人；2026 年计划 11 人，较 2025 年增加 3 人（+37.5%），扩招幅度较大。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科主榜约第 88 名，近年排名稳定，学校层次对历史类考生吸引力中等；2025 年高考周期内声誉偏负面（师德师风事件），抖音热度一般，未见明显正面舆情信号；药学 A+ 为学校核心优势，但历史类招生专业为经济管理试验班（医药方向）和英语（医药方向），与药学核心学科关联较弱，学科优势对历史类考生吸引力有限。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 经济管理类专业社会热度分化观望，英语类专业热度一般观望；本省历史类考生数从 2025 年 142547 人增至 2026 年 187000 人（+31.2%），竞争基数大幅扩大；学校位于江苏南京，非本省高校，在湖南历史类招生人数极少（约 6–11 人），无显著地域偏好。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历史类位次持续后移趋势、2026 年扩招 37.5% 对竞争有一定缓解、但本省历史类考生大幅增加 31.2% 加剧竞争、以及声誉偏负面可能轻微抑制报考热度，预计 2026 年历史类最低录取位次在 2025 年基准上继续后移；预测最低位次约 4984 名，区间 4484–5484 名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 2924→3642→3289→3914→4028, showing an overall backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 1104 places in the last 3 years; the baseline for 2025 is about 4028 places; the enrollment plan for this university in Hunan for History Category was 6 students from 2021 to 2024, increased to 8 students in 2025; the plan for 2026 is 11 students, an increase of 3 students (+37.5%) compared to 2025, indicating a significant expansion.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; approximately 88th on the Soft Science main ranking, with stable rankings in recent years; the university level has moderate appeal to History Category candidates; during the 2025 college entrance examination cycle, reputation is slightly negative (teacher ethics incident), with average Douyin popularity and no obvious positive public opinion signals; Pharmacy A+ is the core advantage of the university, but the History Category enrollment majors are Economic Management Experimental Class (Pharmaceutical Direction) and English (Pharmaceutical Direction), which are weakly related to the core pharmacy discipline, limiting the appeal of the disciplinary advantage to History Category candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Economic management majors have divided social popularity and are in a wait-and-see state; English majors have average popularity and are also in a wait-and-see state; the number of History Category candidates in this province increased from 142,547 in 2025 to 187,000 in 2026 (+31.2%), significantly expanding the competition base; the university is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu, not a local university in Hunan, with very few History Category enrollment places in Hunan (about 6–11 students), and no significant regional preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of History Category rankings, the 37.5% expansion in 2026 which somewhat alleviates competition, but the significant 31.2% increase in History Category candidates in this province intensifying competition, and the slightly negative reputation which may mildly suppress application enthusiasm, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking for History Category in 2026 will continue to shift backward from the 2025 baseline; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 4984, with a range of 4484–5484.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Economic Management Experimental Class (Pharmaceutical Direction).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- English (Pharmaceutical Direction).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: History Category has only 2 enrollment majors, with rankings within the predicted range of 4484–5484. It is recommended to prioritize the Economic Management Experimental Class as the main choice, with the English major as a safety option. Candidates with rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<4484) can focus on the Economic Management Experimental Class.
